commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8b84b7f79f1b0bafc44769a71925397615e3ce87)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the CLI package-update downgrade guard so unresolved `latest` targets skip downgrade confirmation, adds regression tests for unresolved latest and non-latest tags, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +37, Docs +1. Total +38 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: on current main, a registry-resolvable target with `targetVersion == null` and a known current version sets `downgradeRisk` and exits noninteractively before install. I did not execute tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is human/contributor real CLI proof plus a small changelog cleanup, not a safe autonomous repair lane.

target.title: fix(cli): avoid false downgrade prompt for latest tag
target.body:
Repairs #63593 on the existing contributor branch. Thanks @Andy312432 for the original narrow patch.

Current main still treats an unresolved registry target as downgrade risk. The repair should scope the exception to unresolved `latest`, keep unresolved non-`latest` dist-tags protected, add real behavior proof/regression coverage, and rerun Codex review before merge.

Validation: `pnpm -s vitest run src/cli/update-cli.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed`.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156686-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/63593
- Credit: Repair the existing #63593 branch rather than replacing it; preserve @Andy312432's contribution.; Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/63593; Changelog credit should thank @Andy312432 if a changelog entry is added.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run src/cli/update-cli.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: source PR #63593 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against 8b84b7f79f1b.
target.author: app/openclaw-clownfish

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
